item.title: After 6 years living in the U.S, came back to Brazil for his father’s birthday without telling nobody
item.dc:creator: Diteterienare

item.title: When things go wrong. The following collection contains people doing stupid things, people getting very unlucky, people getting very angry and a high content of schadenfreude.
item.description:
No one was seriously injured in any of these, at least that I can tell. Enjoy!
I love this one so much. He never sees the squirrel. For him the customer opens the door, screams in terror and slams the door in his face. It's beautiful.
Remember folks, for a kitchen fire, put a lid on it or use an appropriate fire extinguisher.
Let's finish off with a win.
item.dc:creator: PackratMagpie

item.title: Weight loss progress in 3 years using indoor exercise bike
item.description: Edit: It seems between August and September 2024 she had the excess skin removal surgery.

item.title: Delighted for her!! As someone who has a similar anniversary, can I just say reach out. Your brain is lying, you will get well and you will feel happiness again. Please open up to someone, they care!

item.dc:creator: MrKNRJ

item.title: Things seen this week during structural assessments.
item.description:
This week has been heartbreaking for countless families and entire communities. We are devastated by the widespread destruction caused by the wildfires sweeping through the Greater Los Angeles area, impacting hundreds of thousands of Angelenos. And although we are still facing one of the worst fires in California history, we have seen incredible unity as communities come together and support one another. We want to sincerely thank the thousands of firefighters not just from Los Angeles but from other states, the National Guard, and other countries that have put their lives at risk.
Smoke filling the entire sky. The Palisades and Eaton fires have collectively destroyed over 12,000 homes, businesses, schools, and other structures since they began last Tuesday.
The strong winds that contributed to the spread of the fire brought down countless trees, including this massive branch that crashed onto two cars.
The intense winds reached speeds of 50-80 mph, with some areas experiencing up to 100 mph in the mountains. Here is another tree down, crushing two more cars beneath its weight.
This video was taken by one of our Structural Assessors, Markian, whose Topanga home was saved by a helicopter water drop.
This is from the Eaton Fire in Altadena. Many homes were engulfed in flames and burned to the ground. The devastation left this place nearly unrecognizable.
Our team immediately began working with the Vice Mayor of Pasadena to handle anything on his radar with the resources we have, regardless of the scope. His primary concern was exit roads for evacuation, so we cleared roads, be it removing a massive 100-year-old downed cypress tree blocking 3,000 homes, or just clearing and hauling branches and brush.
The destruction and loss are hard to believe, and seeing our community lose everything has been hard to accept. Shoutout to our team who always responds, no matter what or when. We are currently providing trucks and crews to help property owners move salvageable belongings, cut hazardous trees, create property access, and more. Resources are limited, but we’ll do our best to assist. Email us at info@alphastructural.com with pictures of the damage, your property address, and contact information and we will respond as fast as we can. Our phone lines are open as well for free guidance on engineering questions, insurance claims, legal resources, and rebuilding consulting. Stay strong LA. We will make it through this as we ALWAYS do.
item.dc:creator: AlphaStructural

item.title: Part... whatever of releasing memes back to the wild
item.description:
1. The Spoom!
2. They were so caught up in whether they *could*, they never stopped to think if they *should*
3. I showed this to my wife and she got mad at me
4. "We have Oroborous at home"
5. Lol someone's gonna get mad
6. GULp
7. "Optional"
8. I'll never not find the screaming cowboy funny
9. Someone is gonna "akchyully" about various types of raptors in the comments, while missing the meme entirely
10.
11.
12.
13. I love how no matter how old this is, it's still equally relevant
14. There's more to this, but it paints the picture well
15. I don't do the 1st one only because it would be difficult on a keyboard
16. Not sure why they included him and Peter dinklage, but I'll allow it
17. The ADHD impulse to have all 3 simultaneously and be covered
18. For Karl! Rock n' Stone to the bone!
19. I can't wait to get whacked again... it's been so long...
20. If you know, you know
21.
22.
23.
24.
25. Guilty
26. "Akchuyally" incoming about either them being Maia, or about which one came to middle earth 1st (or the fact that they came to middle earth once before)
27.
28.
29.
30.
31.
32.
33.
34. He can't keep getting away with this!
35.
36.
37.
38.
39.
40.
41. They finally found antifa
42.
43.
44. Coke milk
45.
46.
47. Will always be funny
48. This is what I always thought "give your all" meant
49.
50.
item.dc:creator: GeneralSica

item.title: I've never done one of these before so here goes
item.description: Fp edit: WOW! Thank you all for the fake updoots, the comments and now accolades as I pursue my silly quest to get to the front page. You guys are awesome and I hope you enjoyed the tunes. This one lives rent free in my brain. You guys rock!! ✌️

item.title: I Stole This Dump, So You Don't Have To. Tuesday RANDOM memes of pure chaos! #781
item.description:
1. Now... is she genuine or did she saw a chance and took it?
2. I love that she still posted the video :D
3. His God is the God of Dancing
4
5. Speaking of Gods of Dancing
6. I've always wondered how much money does the Joker have
7. Bro, that was not a bad aim, to be fair
8. This bike comes with some nice handles
9
10. Xerxes's spirit animal! (He once had his army flog the sea)
11. When you're not quite sure if you're into a new fetish
12. Stuffed capybara to save the day
13. Unexpected
14. Gracious dog tax
15. And finally, I would like to show you the latest addition to my Stanley Parable-inspired game. It's book cover meant to be a subtle jab at certain company, that I've hidden somewhere in the game. Do you like the addition? If you like the humor of this dump, I'm sure the game will be to your liking. Please consider wishlisting it, as it is the best way to support small indie devs, like me: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: Another year, another reprimanding..
item.description: Just had my yearly performance review. Got told off for excessive "gallows humour" and banned from saying "big mad" in the teams comms.... Apparently someone was triggered that i was winding them up, saying that oh yeah such and such person will be big mad if you fk that up... I'm surrounded by morons and narcs
item.dc:creator: vonsmallhausen
